Name: Ventra Collector — Microsoft Graph (Application permissions)
Description: Application (app-only) permissions for the Ventra Azure service principal. Grant admin consent in Entra ID after creating the app registration. These are not ARM role assignments.

ApplicationPermissions.notes: Sign-in and directory audit logs. Sign-in logs require Entra ID P1/P2 license.
Directory objects and OAuth2 permission grants.
Office 365 Management Activity API — recent Unified Audit Log (~7 days). Operator must enable audit log ingestion in M365 compliance center; Ventra does not enable feeds.

Notes: Assign the service principal Reader (or a custom role) on each in-scope subscription using docs/iam-policies/azure-collector-readonly.json.
For long-lookback M365 UAL (unified_audit_search), also assign Exchange Administrator and grant Exchange.ManageAsApp — see azure-collector-m365.json.
